note: Curated subset of high-value public datasets. Buckets are anonymously readable (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *).

datasets.name: NOAA Global Historical Climatology Network Daily (GHCN-D)
datasets.description: Daily land surface climate observations (temperature, precipitation, snow) from tens of thousands of stations worldwide, spanning over a century.

datasets.name: Sentinel-2 Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs
datasets.description: Global multispectral satellite imagery from ESA's Sentinel-2 mission, converted to Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs for efficient partial reads.

datasets.name: 1000 Genomes Project
datasets.description: A deep catalog of human genetic variation: whole-genome sequencing data for thousands of individuals across global populations.

datasets.name: NASA Earth Exchange (NEX) Data Collection
datasets.description: Downscaled climate projections and Earth science model outputs from NASA NEX, including NEX-GDDP and NEX-DCP30.

datasets.name: Multi-Scale Ultra High Resolution (MUR) Sea Surface Temperature
datasets.description: Global, gap-free, high-resolution sea surface temperature analysis stored as Zarr for cloud-native access.

datasets.name: Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF) Occurrences
datasets.description: Hundreds of millions of species occurrence records aggregated from museums, citizen science, and research collections worldwide.

datasets.name: Common Crawl
datasets.description: A petabyte-scale corpus of web crawl data (WARC/WAT/WET) collected monthly, widely used to train large language models.

datasets.name: OpenAQ Air Quality Archive
datasets.description: Aggregated open air-quality measurements (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, O3, and more) from government and research monitoring stations globally.

datasets.name: Coupled Model Intercomparison Project 6 (CMIP6)
datasets.description: Global climate model output from CMIP6, stored as analysis-ready Zarr for the WCRP climate projection archive.

datasets.name: ESA WorldCover
datasets.description: Global land cover maps at 10 m resolution derived from Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2, classifying the Earth's surface into land-cover types.

datasets.name: NOAA Global Forecast System (GFS)
datasets.description: Operational global numerical weather prediction output from the NOAA GFS model, covering the whole atmosphere at regular forecast steps.

datasets.name: Amazon Berkeley Objects (ABO)
datasets.description: A dataset of product listings with rich metadata, catalog images, and 3D models — designed for computer vision and e-commerce research.
